name: explanation
description: `explanation` of the rationale when doing so.

name: rm
description: `rm` or `git reset` that the user did not explicitly ask for - (For all of these, you should weigh alternative paths that do not require approval.)

name: apply_patch
description: Apply file-oriented diffs using a stripped-down diff format. Used to create, update, or delete files with precise line-level control.
usage: Used to edit files with headers like 'Add File', 'Update File', or 'Delete File' followed by hunks for line modifications.

name: update_plan
description: Maintain step-by-step plans with status tracking for complex tasks.
usage: Create plans with short steps and track status (pending, in_progress, completed) to make work clearer and collaborative.

name: shell
description: Execute terminal commands with specific guidelines for efficiency and safety.
usage: Run commands in the terminal with preferences for rg/grep for searching and chunked file reading.
